Description: Systemd update fixing critical issues including segmentation fault when encountering ordering cycles, failure to stop user-runtime-dir service for non-existent users, and cryptsetup generator parsing failures
KoreanDescription: 시스템 업데이트로 순서 주기 발생 시 세그먼테이션 오류, 존재하지 않는 사용자에 대한 user-runtime-dir 서비스 중지 실패, 암호화 설정 생성자 구문 분석 실패 등 치명적인 문제 수정
Reason: System hang and boot failure risks due to segmentation fault in core system service

Description: Linux firmware update to latest upstream version, contains device firmware files required for various hardware operations
KoreanDescription: 최신 업스트림 버전으로의 리눅스 펌웨어 업데이트, 다양한 하드웨어 작동에 필요한 장치 펌웨어 파일 포함
Reason: Firmware updates can prevent hardware-related system hangs and data loss

Description: NetworkManager update fixing VF configuration reset issues and unintended removal of unrelated OVS ports
KoreanDescription: VF 설정 재설정 문제와 관련 없는 OVS 포트의 의도치 않은 제거 문제를 수정하는 네트워크 관리자 업데이트
Reason: Network configuration issues can lead to system unavailability and data loss

Description: Sudo update fixing environment variable duplication issue where SHELL variable is passed twice to executed shell
KoreanDescription: 실행된 쉘에 SHELL 환경 변수가 두 번 전달되는 중복 문제를 수정하는 sudo 업데이트
Reason: Privileged access tool, though current issue is low severity

Description: QEMU-KVM update fixing critical VM boot failures with hugepages, SCSI error policy issues, I/O errors on multipath devices, and live migration failures due to missing CPU features
KoreanDescription: 거대 페이지에서의 VM 부팅 실패, SCSI 오류 정책 문제, 다중 경로 장치의 I/O 오류, 누락된 CPU 기능으로 인한 라이브 마이그레이션 실패 등 치명적인 문제 수정
Reason: Critical VM boot failures, I/O errors causing data loss, and live migration issues

Description: Important security update addressing multiple urllib3 vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-66418 (unbounded decompression chain leading to resource exhaustion), CVE-2025-66471 (Streaming API improperly handling highly compressed data), and CVE-2026-21441 (decompression-bomb safeguard bypass when following HTTP redirects). These vulnerabilities could allow resource exhaustion attacks against cluster fencing operations.
KoreanDescription: 중요한 보안 업데이트로 여러 urllib3 취약점을 해결: CVE-2025-66418 (무제한 압축 해제 체인으로 인한 자원 고갈), CVE-2025-66471 (고도로 압축된 데이터를 부적절하게 처리하는 스트리밍 API), CVE-2026-21441 (HTTP 리디렉션 시 압축 폭탄 방어 우회). 이 취약점들은 클러스터 펜싱 작업에 대한 자원 고갈 공격을 허용할 수 있음.
Reason: Critical security vulnerabilities with Important severity rating that could lead to resource exhaustion attacks affecting cluster fencing operations. Multiple CVEs including one with 2026 date indicate recently discovered serious issues.

Description: Bug fix update for idm:client module addressing memory leaks in IPA plugins. No security impact or system stability issues identified.
KoreanDescription: IPA 플러그인의 메모리 누수를 해결하는 idm:client 모듈에 대한 버그 수정 업데이트. 보안 영향이나 시스템 안정성 문제는 없음.
Reason: Memory leak fixes can gradually degrade system performance over time. While not critical, this maintenance update prevents potential long-term stability issues in Identity Management services.

Description: Bug fix update addressing Hyper-V feature validation being too tight for i440fx machine type. This prevents virtual machines from properly utilizing Hyper-V enlightenment features when using the i440fx chipset.
KoreanDescription: i440fx 머신 타입에 대해 Hyper-V 기능 검증이 너무 엄격한 문제를 해결하는 버그 수정 업데이트. i440fx 칩셋 사용 시 가상 머신이 Hyper-V 계몽 기능을 제대로 활용하지 못하는 문제를 방지함.
Reason: Feature validation bug that could prevent proper Hyper-V virtual machine functionality. While not causing system hangs or data loss, it affects virtualization features and should be applied for proper VM operation.

Description: Standard bug fix and enhancement update for iptables package. No specific critical issues identified that could cause system hang, data loss, boot failure, or security vulnerabilities.
KoreanDescription: iptables 패키지에 대한 표준 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트. 시스템 중단, 데이터 손실, 부팅 실패 또는 보안 취약점을 유발할 수 있는 특정 중요한 문제는 없음.
Reason: Routine maintenance update for network firewall functionality. While not critical, keeping iptables current ensures proper network security rule processing and compatibility.

Description: Bug fix update addressing multiple firewalld issues: 'Unmaintained driver' warning with ipset, preventing rules from being flushed when adding invalid ipset rules, CI test improvements, fixing firewalld termination after restart-reload sequence, and iptables output compatibility issues.
KoreanDescription: 여러 firewalld 문제를 해결하는 버그 수정 업데이트: ipset의 '유지보수되지 않는 드라이버' 경고, 무효한 ipset 규칙 추가 시 규칙이 플러시되지 않도록 방지, CI 테스트 개선, 재시작-리로드 시퀀스 후 firewalld 종료 수정, iptables 출력 호환성 문제 해결.
Reason: Multiple bug fixes that could impact firewall stability and rule management. The issue with firewalld termination after restart-reload operations could potentially cause system hang scenarios during firewall reconfiguration.

Description: Fixes TLS key share empty issue when setting unsupported TLS group as first group.
KoreanDescription: 지원되지 않는 TLS 그룹을 첫 번째 그룹으로 설정할 때 빈 키 공유가 발생하는 문제 해결.
Reason: Minor TLS configuration bug fix, no critical system impact

Description: Filesystem utility update with no critical impact details provided.
KoreanDescription: 중요한 영향 정보 없는 파일 시스템 유틸리티 업데이트.
Reason: No specific critical system impact identified in advisory

Description: Boot loader update with memory reservation and BLS snippet sorting fixes.
KoreanDescription: 메모리 예약 및 BLS 스니펫 정렬 문제를 포함한 부트 로더 업데이트.
Reason: Boot loader issues can cause system boot failures, affecting critical system availability

Description: Container runtime update with no critical system impact details.
KoreanDescription: 중요한 시스템 영향 없는 컨테이너 런타임 업데이트.
Reason: Container management tool with no identified critical impact

Description: Annual certificate authority bundle update with dependency package fixes.
KoreanDescription: 의존성 패키지 수정을 포함한 연간 인증 기관 번들 업데이트.
Reason: Certificate updates are critical for system security and SSL/TLS functionality

Description: Update to adapt to latest kernel CIFS changes, minor compatibility improvements.
KoreanDescription: 최신 커널 CIFS 변경사항에 적응하기 위한 업데이트, 사소한 호환성 개선.
Reason: Minor compatibility update with no critical system impact, data loss, or security vulnerabilities.

Description: Test suite result updates and minor bug fixes including memory leak fixes.
KoreanDescription: 테스트 스위트 결과 업데이트 및 메모리 누수 수정을 포함한 사소한 버그 수정.
Reason: Test infrastructure updates and minor bug fixes with no critical system impact.

Description: Intel CPU microcode update to latest version.
KoreanDescription: Intel CPU 마이크로코드를 최신 버전으로 업데이트.
Reason: Routine microcode update with no specific critical security vulnerabilities or system stability issues mentioned.

Description: Fixes segmentation faults in multithreaded programs and group membership resolution issues.
KoreanDescription: 멀티스레드 프로그램에서의 세그멘테이션 오류 및 그룹 멤버십 확인 문제 해결.
Reason: Critical system library fixes addressing segmentation faults that could cause application crashes and data integrity issues.

Description: Documentation fix for ifdown manpage symlink issue.
KoreanDescription: ifdown 매뉴얼 페이지 심볼릭 링크 문제에 대한 문서 수정.
Reason: Minor documentation fix with no impact on system stability or functionality.

Description: Bug fix update for NetworkManager-libreswan addressing RSA key import failures and duplicate 'phase2alg' key issues in VPN connections
KoreanDescription: NetworkManager-libreswan 버그 수정 업데이트 - RSA 키 가져오기 실패 및 중복 'phase2alg' 키 문제 해결
Reason: Low risk bug fix addressing VPN connection stability issues. No System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security impacts identified.

Description: Bug fix update for keepalived addressing healthchecker threads stopping permanently, which could impact load balancing and high availability
KoreanDescription: keepalived 버그 수정 업데이트 - 상태 검사기 스레드 영구적 중단 문제 해결로 로드 밸런싱 및 고가용성 영향 방지
Reason: Medium priority as healthchecker thread failures could cause availability issues, but no immediate System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security risks.

Description: Bug fix update for device-mapper-multipath addressing multiple bugs in persistent reservation handling which could affect storage device management
KoreanDescription: device-mapper-multipath 버그 수정 업데이트 - 영구 예약 처리 관련 다중 버그 수정으로 스토리지 장치 관리 안정성 향상
Reason: Medium priority due to potential storage stability issues, but no immediate System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security vulnerabilities identified.

Description: SELinux policy update allowing nfsd_t domain setuid/setgid capabilities for rpc.mountd and proper redis.conf file labeling
KoreanDescription: SELinux 정책 업데이트 - nfsd_t 도메인의 setuid/setgid 권한 허용 및 redis.conf 파일 레이블링 수정
Reason: Low risk security policy improvements. No System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security issues present.

Description: Standard audit package update with bug fixes and enhancements as detailed in RHEL 9.7 Release Notes
KoreanDescription: 감사(audit) 패키지 표준 업데이트 - RHEL 9.7 릴리스 노트에 상세된 버그 수정 및 기능 향상
Reason: Routine low-priority update with no System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security impacts identified.

Description: Routine bug fix and enhancement update for mokutil utility
KoreanDescription: mokutil 유틸리티에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: Routine bug fix and enhancement update with no critical system impact indicators. No evidence of System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security vulnerabilities.

Description: Routine bug fix and enhancement update for NFS utilities
KoreanDescription: NFS 유틸리티에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: Routine bug fix and enhancement update with no critical system impact indicators. No evidence of System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security vulnerabilities.

Description: Routine bug fix and enhancement update for XFS filesystem utilities
KoreanDescription: XFS 파일 시스템 유틸리티에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: While filesystem-related, this is a routine bug fix and enhancement update with no specific evidence of data corruption, file system errors, or other critical system failures that would meet inclusion criteria.

Description: Fix for iSCSI paths failing to get reinstated after ONTAP failover operations
KoreanDescription: ONTAP 페일오버 작업 후 iSCSI 경로가 재설정되지 않는 문제 해결
Reason: While this affects failover operations, the issue is marked as severity 'None' and doesn't clearly demonstrate critical system impact like complete High Availability failure or data loss. Appears to be a specific interoperability issue rather than a critical system stability problem.

Description: Fix for RAID1 LV's failing to setup integrity after RHEL 8.10 upgrade
KoreanDescription: RHEL 8.10 업그레이드 후 RAID1 논리 볼륨의 무결성 설정 실패 문제 해결
Reason: This patch addresses a critical data integrity issue where RAID1 logical volumes with integrity features fail to setup properly after upgrade. This directly impacts Data Loss/Corruption prevention criteria and affects the core storage subsystem, making it critical for system stability.

Description: General bug fix and enhancement update for gnutls
KoreanDescription: gnutls에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: Minor bug fix and enhancement update - no critical system impact identified

Description: General bug fix and enhancement update for libselinux
KoreanDescription: libselinux에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: Minor bug fix and enhancement update - no critical system impact identified

Description: General bug fix and enhancement update for smartmontools
KoreanDescription: smartmontools에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: Minor bug fix and enhancement update - no critical system impact identified

Description: General bug fix and enhancement update for dbus-broker
KoreanDescription: dbus-broker에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: Minor bug fix and enhancement update - no critical system impact identified

Description: General bug fix and enhancement update for polkit
KoreanDescription: polkit에 대한 일반적인 버그 수정 및 기능 향상 업데이트
Reason: Minor bug fix and enhancement update - no critical system impact identified

Description: An update for shim is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10. The shim package contains a first-stage UEFI boot loader that handles chaining to a trusted full boot loader under secure boot environments. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): shim 8_10 release needs to be bumped to match 8_9 to fix broken update path (JIRA:RHEL-113358) Leapp IPU 8.10>9.7 fails due to an invalid signature for the kernel (JIRA:RHEL-126741)
KoreanDescription: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10용 shim 업데이트가 제공됩니다. shim 패키지는 보안 부팅 환경에서 신뢰할 수 있는 전체 부트 로더로 체이닝을 처리하는 1단계 UEFI 부트 로더를 포함합니다. 버그 수정 및 개선: shim 8_10 릴리스를 8_9와 일치시켜 업데이트 경로 수정 (JIRA:RHEL-113358) Leapp IPU 8.10>9.7이 커널의 유효하지 않은 서명으로 인해 실패 (JIRA:RHEL-126741)
Reason: Although marked as 'None' severity, this patch addresses critical boot-related issues including broken update paths and invalid kernel signatures that could cause Boot Fail in secure boot environments during system upgrades

Description: An update for corosync is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10. For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
KoreanDescription: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10용 corosync 업데이트가 제공됩니다. 이 릴리스의 변경 사항에 대한 자세한 정보는 참조 섹션에 링크된 Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 릴리스 노트를 참조하십시오.
Reason: No specific details provided about potential System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security issues. Generic update description without actionable security impact information

Description: An update for pacemaker is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10. The Pacemaker cluster resource manager is a collection of technologies working together to maintain data integrity and application availability in the event of failures. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): DC node gets fenced during unstandby operation when cluster is managing large number of resources (JIRA:RHEL-76276)
KoreanDescription: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10용 pacemaker 업데이트가 제공됩니다. Pacemaker 클러스터 리소스 관리자는 장애 발생 시 데이터 무결성과 애플리케이션 가용성을 유지하기 위해 함께 작동하는 기술의 모음입니다. 버그 수정 및 개선: 클러스터가 대량의 리소스를 관리할 때 unstandby 작업 중 DC 노드가 펜싱됨 (JIRA:RHEL-76276)
Reason: Addresses a critical cluster management issue where DC nodes get fenced during unstandby operations with large resource counts, which could lead to System Hang and potential Data Loss in high-availability cluster environments

Description: An update for pam is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10. Pluggable Authentication Modules (PAM) provide a system to set up authentication policies without the need to recompile programs to handle authentication. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL8] The third field, as documented in shadow(5) seems to behave wrongly: if empty, the password is considered expired. (JIRA:RHEL-70476)
KoreanDescription: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10용 pam 업데이트가 제공됩니다. Pluggable Authentication Modules(PAM)는 인증을 처리하기 위해 프로그램을 재컴파일할 필요 없이 인증 정책을 설정하는 시스템을 제공합니다. 버그 수정 및 개선: [RHEL8] shadow(5)에 문서화된 대로 세 번째 필드가 잘못 동작함: 비어 있으면 암호가 만료된 것으로 간주됨 (JIRA:RHEL-70476)
Reason: Fixes a critical authentication issue where empty password fields are incorrectly treated as expired, which could lead to Critical Security problems by potentially locking out users or causing authentication failures

Description: An update for openssh is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10. For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
KoreanDescription: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10용 openssh 업데이트가 제공됩니다. 이 릴리스의 변경 사항에 대한 자세한 정보는 참조 섹션에 링크된 Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 릴리스 노트를 참조하십시오.
Reason: No specific details provided about potential System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security issues. Generic update description for SSH component without actionable security impact information

Description: Resolves denial of service vulnerabilities in crypto/x509, memory exhaustion in net/url, and unexpected session resumption in crypto/tls.
KoreanDescription: 악성 인증서로 인한 서비스 거부, 쿼리 파라미터 파싱 시 메모리 고갈, TLS 세션 재개 취약점 해결.
Reason: Multiple CVEs affecting container runtime stability including DoS and memory exhaustion vulnerabilities.

Description: Fixes multiple use-after-free vulnerabilities in page_pool, bridge multicast, SMC, and teql queueing discipline.
KoreanDescription: 커널 메모리 관리 결함으로 인한 use-after-free 취약점 해결 및 권한 상승 방지.
Reason: Critical memory corruption vulnerabilities with privilege escalation risk affecting core kernel functionality.

Description: Fixes NSS database password corruption and FIPS compliance issues in cryptographic libraries.
KoreanDescription: NSS 데이터베이스 암호 변경 시 ML-DSA 시드 손상 및 FIPS 준수 문제 해결.
Reason: Minor bug fixes without critical security impact or system stability issues.

Description: Resolves urllib3 resource exhaustion vulnerabilities affecting high-availability clustering components.
KoreanDescription: urllib3의 압축 해제 취약점으로 인한 자원 고갈 문제 해결 및 HA 클러스터 안정성 확보.
Reason: Resource exhaustion vulnerabilities in critical high-availability components could lead to service disruption.

Description: Routine firmware update to latest upstream version without critical security fixes.
KoreanDescription: 최신 업스트림 버전으로의 펌웨어 리베이스로 주요 보안 취약점 없음.
Reason: Routine firmware update with no critical security or stability impact.

Description: Oracle Linux 8 systemd update with multiple bug fixes including symlink handling, device management, coredump security fix (CVE-2025-4598), and container improvements.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 8 systemd 업데이트로 심볼릭 링크 처리, 장치 관리, 코어덤프 보안 수정(CVE-2025-4598) 및 컨테이너 개선을 포함한 다중 버그 수정.
Reason: Contains critical security fix (CVE-2025-4598) and multiple system stability improvements. Low risk as this is a cumulative update with well-tested fixes from multiple previous patches.

Description: Oracle Linux 10 NetworkManager update with Oracle server connectivity check and SR-IOV/OVS port handling improvements.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 10 NetworkManager 업데이트로 Oracle 서버 연결 확인 및 SR-IOV/OVS 포트 처리 개선 포함.
Reason: Low risk enhancement update. Adds Oracle-specific connectivity checks and fixes network virtualization issues. No critical security concerns but improves network reliability.

Description: Oracle Linux 8 sudo update including critical security fix (CVE-2025-32462) for privilege escalation and session handling improvements.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 8 sudo 업데이트로 권한 상승에 대한 중요 보안 수정(CVE-2025-32462) 및 세션 처리 개선 포함.
Reason: Contains critical security vulnerability (CVE-2025-32462) that allows privilege escalation. This is a high-priority security patch that should be applied immediately to prevent potential security breaches.

Description: Oracle Linux 9 qemu-kvm update fixing live migration issues, multipath device I/O errors, SNP guest boot failures with hugepages, and SCSI error policy handling.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 9 qemu-kvm 업데이트로 라이브 마이그레이션 문제, 다중 경로 장치 I/O 오류, hugepages를 사용한 SNP 게스트 부팅 실패 및 SCSI 오류 정책 처리 수정 포함.
Reason: Critical for virtualization stability. Fixes VM live migration failures, I/O errors in storage environments, and boot issues. These are critical for production virtualization workloads and prevent data corruption.

Description: Oracle Linux 8 fence-agents security update fixing CVE-2026-23490 in bundled pyasn1 library.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 8 fence-agents 보안 업데이트로 번들된 pyasn1 라이브러리의 CVE-2026-23490 수정 포함.
Reason: Security update marked as 'Important' severity. Fixes CVE-2026-23490 in pyasn1 library. Critical for cluster fencing security and prevents potential escalation in high-availability environments.

Description: Oracle Linux 8 update for libvirt and related virtualization packages including security fixes for CVE-2023-3354 (QEMU VNC TLS handshake denial of service) and CVE-2022-40284, plus boot fixes for VirtIO-SCSI configurations.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 8용 libvirt 및 관련 가상화 패키지 업데이트로, CVE-2023-3354(QEMU VNC TLS 핸드셰이크 서비스 거부) 및 CVE-2022-40284 보안 수정과 VirtIO-SCSI 구성에 대한 부팅 수정 포함.
Reason: Contains critical security CVE fixes (CVE-2023-3354 - remote unauthenticated DoS) and important boot stability fixes. The VNC vulnerability could allow remote attackers to cause denial of service without authentication, making this a high-priority security update.

Description: Oracle Linux 10 iptables update fixing dependency issues for UEK kernel flavors and kernel-modules-extra-matched package installation.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 10 iptables 업데이트로 UEK 커널 버전 및 kernel-modules-extra-matched 패키지 설치에 대한 의존성 문제 수정.
Reason: Low-risk dependency and compatibility fix. Resolves package installation issues that could prevent proper firewall functionality, which is important for system security posture. No critical security vulnerabilities but recommended for system stability.

Description: Oracle Linux 10 firewalld update removing Red Hat Satellite and high availability references from cockpit UI, plus rebase to version 2.4.0.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 10 firewalld 업데이트로 cockpit UI에서 Red Hat Satellite 및 고가용성 참조 제거 및 버전 2.4.0으로 리베이스.
Reason: Low-risk maintenance update removing outdated references and updating to newer stable version. Cleans up configuration artifacts that could cause confusion but doesn't introduce critical functionality changes. Recommended for keeping system clean and up-to-date.

CRITICAL: Contains fixes for 12 security vulnerabilities including multiple high-risk CVEs. OpenSSL is a core cryptographic library used throughout the system - vulnerabilities here could lead to complete system compromise, data breaches, or cryptographic failures. This is a highest-priority security update that should be applied immediately.

Description: Oracle Linux 9 e2fsprogs update ensuring at least EXT2_FIRST_INO + 1 inodes are available in ext2 filesystem operations.
KoreanDescription: Oracle Linux 9 e2fsprogs 업데이트로 ext2 파일시스템 작업에서 EXT2_FIRST_INO + 1 이상의 아이노드가 사용 가능하도록 보장.
Reason: Low-risk filesystem stability fix. Prevents potential inode allocation issues that could cause filesystem errors. While not a security vulnerability, filesystem integrity is critical for data loss prevention, making this a recommended update for system reliability.

Description: GRUB2 bootloader update containing Secure Boot certificate updates, SBAT metadata fixes, CVE-2022-3775 fix, and EFI signing improvements
KoreanDescription: GRUB2 부트로더 업데이트 - Secure Boot 인증서 업데이트, SBAT 메타데이터 수정, CVE-2022-3775 수정 및 EFI 서명 개선 포함
Reason: Contains CVE-2022-3775 fix and critical Secure Boot certificate updates. Bootloader patches are high-impact but necessary for security

Description: Certificate authority bundle update adding 15 new root CAs including TWCA, SecureSign, D-TRUST, and TrustAsia certificates
KoreanDescription: 인증 기관 번들 업데이트 - TWCA, SecureSign, D-TRUST, TrustAsia 등 15개 새로운 루트 인증서 추가
Reason: Certificate updates are essential for TLS/SSL validation. Missing CAs can cause connection failures and security warnings

Description: CIFS/SMB utilities update with use-after-free fix in cifs.upcall and CLDAP ping implementation
KoreanDescription: CIFS/SMB 유틸리티 업데이트 - cifs.upcall의 use-after-free 수정 및 CLDAP ping 구현 포함
Reason: Contains memory safety fix (UAF) that could lead to privilege escalation. Filesystem utilities are important for network storage access

Description: nftables firewall update with Big Endian existence check fix, memory leak fixes, and flowtable event monitoring improvements
KoreanDescription: nftables 방화벽 업데이트 - 빅 엔디안 존재 확인 수정, 메모리 누수 수정 및 플로우테이블 이벤트 모니터링 개선
Reason: Firewall component with bug fixes including memory leak prevention. Network filtering is critical for system security

Description: Intel CPU microcode update fixing RPL070/ADL083/LNL047/ARL054/SPR154/EMR147 errata affecting multiple CPU generations
KoreanDescription: Intel CPU 마이크로코드 업데이트 - 여러 CPU 세대에 영향을 미치는 RPL070/ADL083/LNL047/ARL054/SPR154/EMR147 에라타 수정
Reason: Critical CPU microcode fixes for hardware vulnerabilities that could cause data corruption or security bypass. Affects core system stability

Description: Memory Tagging Extension (MTE) support for stpcpy function and various Oracle-specific forward ports for system stability.
KoreanDescription: stpcpy 함수에 대한 MTE(메모리 태깅 확장) 지원 및 시스템 안정성을 위한 Oracle 특정 포트 포함.
Reason: Core system library update with memory safety improvements and system stability enhancements.

Description: Bug fix for NetworkManager handling function and documentation update.
KoreanDescription: NetworkManager 처리 함수 버그 수정 및 문서 업데이트.
Reason: Minor bug fix without critical system impact.

Description: Version upgrade with fixes for phase2alg duplicate key errors and RSA key import functionality.
KoreanDescription: phase2alg 중복 키 오류 및 RSA 키 가져오기 기능 수정을 포함한 버전 업그레이드.
Reason: VPN connectivity fixes that could affect network availability and secure communications.

Description: Fix for blackhole route tracking interface issue affecting high availability monitoring.
KoreanDescription: 고가용성 모니터링에 영향을 미치는 블랙홀 경로 추적 인터페이스 문제 수정.
Reason: High availability component fix that could prevent failover failures.

Description: Comprehensive fixes for multipath persistent reservation handling including race conditions, memory leaks, and data integrity issues.
KoreanDescription: 경쟁 상태, 메모리 누수 및 데이터 무결성 문제를 포함한 다중 경로 영구 예약 처리에 대한 포괄적인 수정.
Reason: Critical storage infrastructure fixes addressing potential data loss and system stability issues.

Description: SELinux policy update containing multiple bug fixes and policy improvements including fixes for agetty checkpoint restore, kdump memfd objects, cgroup filesystems, exim mail handling, mailman log management, and various MLS policy compatibility fixes.
KoreanDescription: SELinux 정책 업데이트로 agetty 체크포인트 복원, kdump memfd 객체, cgroup 파일시스템, exim 메일 처리, mailman 로그 관리 및 다양한 MLS 정책 호환성 수정을 포함한 다수의 버그 수정이 포함됨.
Reason: Low risk security policy update with no critical issues. Contains important SELinux policy fixes that improve system security and compatibility without risk of system hang, data loss, or boot failure.

Description: Audit subsystem update with race condition fixes, event detection improvements, and enhanced error messaging. Includes fixes for ausearch checkpoint race condition and TTY hostname logging issues.
KoreanDescription: 감사 하위 시스템 업데이트로 경쟁 상태 수정, 이벤트 감지 개선 및 향상된 오류 메시징이 포함됨. ausearch 체크포인트 경쟁 상태 및 TTY 호스트 이름 로깅 문제 수정 포함.
Reason: Low risk maintenance update for audit logging system. Fixes race conditions and improves reliability without introducing critical security risks or potential for system instability.

Description: Machine Owner Key (MOK) utility version bump to upstream tag 0.7.2. This is a routine version update with minimal changes.
KoreanDescription: 머신 소유자 키(MOK) 유틸리티 버전 업스트림 태그 0.7.2로 업데이트. 최소한의 변경이 있는 일반적인 버전 업데이트.
Reason: Very low risk version update for MOK utility. No functional changes that would impact system stability, security, or boot process. Routine maintenance update.

Description: NFS utilities update with service management improvements, GSS proxy warning fixes, and connection backlog enhancements. Includes fixes for service stopping during uninstallation and GSS-related issues.
KoreanDescription: NFS 유틸리티 업데이트로 서비스 관리 개선, GSS 프록시 경고 수정 및 연결 백로그 향상이 포함됨. 제거 시 서비스 중지 및 GSS 관련 문제 수정 포함.
Reason: Low risk network file system utilities update. Contains service management improvements and bug fixes that enhance reliability without introducing critical security vulnerabilities or system stability issues.

Description: XFS filesystem utilities update with critical filesystem repair fixes and PMEM filesystem support. Includes fixes for unrepairable filesystem issues when directory blocks are not properly junked during phase 3 repair.
KoreanDescription: XFS 파일시스템 유틸리티 업데이트로 중요한 파일시스템 복구 수정 및 PMEM 파일시스템 지원이 포함됨. 3단계 복구 시 디렉토리 블록이 적절히 정리되지 않을 때 발생하는 복구 불가능한 파일시스템 문제 수정 포함.
Reason: Medium importance filesystem utilities update with critical repair fixes. Addressing unrepairable filesystem issues that could lead to data loss if not applied. Contains important fixes for XFS filesystem integrity.

Description: Resolves iSCSI storage connectivity issues including path reinstatement failures, improves service reliability with proper restart handling and session timeout tuning.
KoreanDescription: iSCSI 스토리지 연결 문제 해결. 경로 복구 실패 수정 및 서비스 안정성 향상.

Description: Removes symlink protection for /dev/disk/by-label symlinks.
KoreanDescription: /dev/disk/by-label 심볼릭 링크 보호 기능 제거.
Reason: Minor change without critical system impact. Historical context shows data integrity fixes but this specific change is a minor adjustment.

Description: Minor TLS rekeying logic improvement. Historical CVE fixes already included.
KoreanDescription: TLS 키 갱신 로직 개선. 과거 CVE 수정은 이전 버전에 이미 포함됨.
Reason: CVEs were fixed in version 3.8.3-7. This is just a minor rework of rekeying logic without new critical issues.

Description: Ignores files removed during SELinux relabeling to avoid errors.
KoreanDescription: SELinux 재라벨링 중 삭제된 파일을 무시하여 오류 방지.
Reason: Minor quality-of-life fix that reduces error messages during relabeling. No system hang, data loss, boot failure, or critical security impact.

Description: Changes printf to jout() in SCSI pending defects printing function.
KoreanDescription: SCSI 보류 중인 결함 출력 함수에서 printf를 jout()로 변경.
Reason: Minor output format fix. No system stability or critical impact.

Description: Minor bug fixes: cosmetic change to dbus user GECOS field, adding sysusers.d config for automatic user/group creation, and sockopt compatibility fix for kernel 6.16.
KoreanDescription: 사소한 버그 수정: dbus 사용자 GECOS 필드 변경, 자동 사용자/그룹 생성을 위한 sysusers.d 구성 추가, 커널 6.16 호환성을 위한 sockopt 수정.
Reason: Minor cosmetic and packaging changes with no critical system impact or security vulnerabilities

Description: Bug fix: increased timeout to prevent defunct processes, and aarch64 test failure fix for undefined symbol __aarch64_ldadd4_acq_rel.
KoreanDescription: 버그 수정: 좀비 프로세스 방지를 위한 타임아웃 증가, aarch64에서 정의되지 않은 심볼 __aarch64_ldadd4_acq_rel 관련 테스트 실패 수정.
Reason: Minor bug fixes without critical system impact or security vulnerabilities

Description: UEFI secure boot shim update to version 16.1 with Microsoft and Oracle Secure Boot Signing key 2, and updated SBAT metadata.
KoreanDescription: UEFI 보안 부트 부트로더 업데이트: 버전 16.1로 업그레이드, Microsoft 및 Oracle Secure Boot 서명 키 2 사용, SBAT 메타데이터 갱신.
Reason: Routine secure boot shim update with no critical security issues or system stability concerns

Description: Container runtime update addressing golang CVE-2025-61726, with fixes for device startup timing and overlay unmount error handling.
KoreanDescription: 컨테이너 런타임 업데이트: golang 보안 취약점 CVE-2025-61726 해결, 장치 시작 시간 및 오버레이 언마운트 오류 처리 수정.
Reason: Important security update addressing CVE-2025-61726 in golang runtime affecting container infrastructure

Description: Cluster communication engine update: CVE-2025-30472 fix for token message size validation in totemsrp, plus systemd integration enhancements.
KoreanDescription: 클러스터 통신 엔진 업데이트: totemsrp의 토큰 메시지 크기 검증 관련 CVE-2025-30472 해결, systemd 통합 기능 개선.
Reason: CVE-2025-30472 is marked as None severity with no evidence of RCE or critical cluster failure impact

Description: Race condition fix between daemons when erasing transient attributes. Minor bug fix.
KoreanDescription: 데몬 간 일시적 속성 삭제 시 경쟁 상태 해결. 사소한 버그 수정.
Reason: Minor bug fix with no system impact. Severity is None. Does not meet criteria for System Hang, Data Loss, Boot Fail, or Critical Security.

Description: Prevents DNS cache poisoning due to weak PRNG (CVE-2025-40780). Addresses various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778).
KoreanDescription: 약한 PRNG로 인한 DNS 캐시 포이즈닝 방지 (CVE-2025-40780). 다양한 스푸핑 공격 해결 (CVE-2025-40778).
Reason: Critical Security - DNS cache poisoning allows attackers to redirect legitimate traffic to malicious servers. Matches 'Critical Security: Auth Bypass' criterion.

Description: Fixes potential privilege escalation vulnerability in pam_namespace (CVE-2025-6020).
KoreanDescription: pam_namespace의 잠재적 권한 상승 취약점 해결 (CVE-2025-6020).
Reason: Critical Security - Privilege Escalation is explicitly listed as a criterion for inclusion. High risk of root compromise.

Description: Fixes use-after-free in TLS stack (CVE-2025-40149) and network subsystem locking to prevent data corruption and potential system crashes.
KoreanDescription: TLS 스택의 use-after-free 취약점 수정 (CVE-2025-40149) 및 네트워크 서브시스템 잠금 개선으로 데이터 손상 및 잠재적 시스템 크래시 방지.
Reason: Critical Security - Use-after-free in kernel network subsystem can lead to arbitrary code execution and system crashes. Meets both 'System Hang/Crash' and 'Critical Security' criteria.

Description: Updates upstream references and fixes AuthorizedPrincipalsCommand when AuthorizedKeysCommand is used. Log level adjustment.
KoreanDescription: 업스트림 참조 업데이트 및 AuthorizedKeysCommand 사용 시 AuthorizedPrincipalsCommand 수정. 로그 레벨 조정.
Reason: Minor bug fix and enhancement. Severity is None. No security vulnerabilities or system stability issues. Does not meet any inclusion criteria.

description: Rebuild for new golang to address CVE-2025-68121
koreanDescription: CVE-2025-68121을 해결하기 위해 새로운 golang 버전으로 리빌드
reason: Moderate security fix without evidence of RCE or critical system impact

description: Fixes multiple Use-After-Free vulnerabilities (CVE-2025-38106, CVE-2025-68197), NULL pointer dereferences (CVE-2025-40034, CVE-2025-38141), UAF in macvlan (CVE-2026-23001), resource leaks in GPIO cdev (CVE-2025-40249), OOB read in USB core (CVE-2025-39760), BUG() in IPv6 calipso (CVE-2025-71085), dma-fences safe access fix (CVE-2025-38703), and incorrect pointer arithmetic in intel-thc-hid (CVE-2025-39818)
koreanDescription: io_uring의 Use-After-Free 취약점(CVE-2025-38106), GPIO cdev 리소스 누수(CVE-2025-40249), macvlan의 UAF(CVE-2026-23001), IPv6 calipso BUG()(CVE-2025-71085), USB 코어 OOB 읽기(CVE-2025-39760) 및 복수의 NULL 포인터 역참조(CVE-2025-40034, CVE-2025-38141) 수정
reason: Multiple Critical memory safety vulnerabilities including Use-After-Free, NULL pointer dereferences, and out-of-bounds reads that could lead to system crashes, data loss, or potential privilege escalation

description: Fixes incomplete ml-kem pct patch, regression in bug fix, null in ml-dsa pkcs12 decode, and return code in ml-kem pct
koreanDescription: 불완전한 ml-kem pct 패치, 버그 수정 회귀, ml-dsa pkcs12 디코딩의 null 문제 및 ml-kem pct의 반환 코드 수정
reason: Minor bug fixes with no evidence of system hang, data loss, or critical security impact

description: Fixes NULL pointer dereference in blk_zone_reset_all_bio_endio, fuse runtime warning (CVE-2025-38357), PCI/AER NULL pointer dereference (CVE-2025-40034), bnxt_en null pointer dereference (CVE-2025-68197), TLS dst_dev RCU fix (CVE-2025-40149), iomap async read allocation (CVE-2025-68357), usbnet preemptible code warnings (CVE-2025-40164), network dst_dev RCU fix (CVE-2025-40170), raid10 discard barrier issue (CVE-2025-40325), mlx5 CQ default values (CVE-2025-68209), and multiple network driver fixes
koreanDescription: blk_zone_reset_all_bio_endio의 NULL 포인터 역참조, fuse 런타임 경고(CVE-2025-38357), PCI/AER NULL 포인터 역참조(CVE-2025-40034), bnxt_en NULL 포인터 역참조(CVE-2025-68197), TLS dst_dev RCU 수정(CVE-2025-40149), iomap 비동기 읽기 할당(CVE-2025-68357) 및 raid10 버rier 문제(CVE-2025-40325) 등 복수의 커널 취약점 수정
reason: Critical memory safety vulnerabilities including multiple NULL pointer dereferences, UAF, and race conditions that could cause system crashes, data corruption, or potential privilege escalation

description: Corrects flaws in GPU drivers and MMC subsystem (CVE-2022-49267, CVE-2025-21780)
koreanDescription: GPU 드라이버 및 MMC 서브시스템의 결함 수정(CVE-2022-49267, CVE-2025-21780)
reason: Moderate security fixes affecting GPU and MMC subsystems with no evidence of system hang, data loss, or critical system-wide impact

Description: Resolves container escape vulnerabilities allowing attackers to replace critical system files with symlinks and escape container isolation. CVE-2025-31133 and CVE-2025-52565 enable unauthorized file manipulation and potential host compromise. CVE-2025-52881 fixes incomplete patch for CVE-2019-16884 preventing denial of service and container escape.
KoreanDescription: 컨테이너 탈취 취약점 해결. 공격자가 /dev/null 및 /dev/console을 심볼릭 링크로 교체하여 컨테이너 격리를 우회하고 호스트 시스템에 접근할 수 있는 취약점(CVE-2025-31133, CVE-2025-52565) 수정. CVE-2019-16884 불완전한 패치로 인한 서비스 거부 및 컨테이너 탈취 가능성 해결(CVE-2025-52881).
Reason: Critical container escape vulnerabilities allowing host compromise through symlink replacement and bind-mount manipulation.

Description: Resolves directory permission misconfiguration allowing unauthorized file access (CVE-2024-25621) and denial of service vulnerability in container attach goroutine execution (CVE-2025-64329).
KoreanDescription: 디렉토리 경로 권한 설정 오류로 인한 무단 파일 접근 가능성 해결(CVE-2024-25621) 및 컨테이너 연결 고루틴 실행 오류로 인한 서비스 거부 취약점 수정(CVE-2025-64329).
Reason: Unauthorized file access and denial of service are moderate security issues not meeting Critical System Impact criteria (no RCE, privilege escalation, or data corruption).

Description: Resolves denial of service through malicious certificate resource consumption (CVE-2025-14831) and PKCS11 token label mishandling potentially causing crashes or code execution (CVE-2025-9820). Default compiler options mitigate to DoS only.
KoreanDescription: 악의적인 인증서 처리로 인한 자원 소모 서비스 거부 취약점 해결(CVE-2025-14831) 및 PKCS11 토큰 라벨 처리 오류로 인한 충돌 또는 잠재적 코드 실행 가능성 수정(CVE-2025-9820). 기본 컴파일러 옵션으로 서비스 거부로 완화됨.
Reason: Denial of service and potential code execution mitigated by compiler options do not meet Critical System Impact criteria. No confirmed RCE or privilege escalation in production configurations.

Description: Resolves multiple denial of service vulnerabilities and potential code execution risks including UHCI controller invalid state (CVE-2024-8354), VNC memory handling RCE possibility (CVE-2025-11234), e1000 out-of-bounds write (CVE-2025-12464), virtio-crypto path length limit bypass (CVE-2025-14876), and KVM Xen guest out-of-bounds read (CVE-2026-0665).
KoreanDescription: 다중 서비스 거부 취약점 및 잠재적 코드 실행 위험 해결. UHCI 컨트롤러 무효 상태(CVE-2024-8354), VNC 메모리 처리로 인한 잠재적 원격 코드 실행(CVE-2025-11234), e1000 경계 외 쓰기(CVE-2025-12464), virtio-crypto 경로 길이 제한 우회(CVE-2025-14876), KVM Xen 게스트 경계 외 읽기(CVE-2026-0665) 수정.
Reason: All vulnerabilities require attacker inside guest VM or network access to VNC. VNC RCE is potential not confirmed, and DoS impacts virtualization hosts not base system. Does not meet Critical System Impact criteria for host system stability.
